hero_subtitle: SFTY gives VASP leaders a unified view across compliance workflows to monitor risk, prepare audit evidence, and maintain operational control amid evolving regulations.
trust_card_1_value: Identity checks connected to onboarding decisions
trust_card_2_value: Corporate verification, UBO review and entity risk
trust_card_3_value: Wallet and transaction monitoring in one workflow
trust_card_4_value: Message routing, completeness checks and exception handling
trust_card_5_value: Regulatory changes mapped to internal rule
trust_card_6_value: Decision logs and evidence for every review
problem_title: Executive oversight fades without clear compliance view
problem_description: Leadership teams struggle to monitor regulatory readiness when compliance workflows remain fragmented across multiple tools and providers. This creates gaps in risk visibility, slows audit readiness, and obscures accountability in critical compliance decisions.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY organizes dispersed provider outputs, case decisions, regulatory updates and audit evidence into a unified operational layer that delivers risk visibility and readiness for executive oversight.
workflow_title: From regulatory change to internal rules
workflow_description: SFTY monitors regulatory updates and maps them to internal policies to guide rule changes and maintain clear operational compliance control for executives.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit
why_sfty_title: Not another dashboard. Executive risk visibility
why_sfty_description: SFTY gives executives a provider-neutral layer that turns fragmented compliance data into audit-ready decisions, evidence and a clear regulatory readiness operating view.
why_sfty_card_1_description: Work above existing KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule tools
why_sfty_card_2_description: Turn disconnected outputs into structured reviews and cases
why_sfty_card_3_description: Preserve evidence, reviewer actions and decision history
why_sfty_card_4_description: Give compliance, risk and leadership one operating view
authority_description: SFTY supports regulated VASPs with scalable workflows that preserve audit-ready evidence and enable bank due diligence within secure enterprise deployments.
authority_card_1_description: Connect KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers into one workflow
authority_card_2_description: Preserve provider outputs, reviewer notes, decisions and supporting records
authority_card_3_description: Prepare clearer compliance evidence for banks, partners and external review
authority_card_4_description: Support private environments, permissions, integrations and internal governance
ask_sfty_placeholder: How can SFTY help executives manage regulatory readiness
ask_sfty_chip_1_message: Show how SFTY provides a connected compliance operating view
ask_sfty_chip_2_message: Explain how audit-ready evidence supports executive decision making
ask_sfty_chip_3_message: Describe how SFTY connects risk signals to regulatory oversight
ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for product, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: What is SFTY for executive risk control?
faq_1_answer: SFTY provides executives a connected compliance view by connecting provider outputs into structured workflows, supporting risk control, audit readiness, and scalable regulatory oversight for digital asset businesses.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY support regulatory readiness?
faq_2_answer: SFTY supports regulatory readiness by mapping regulatory changes to internal workflows, tracking approval logs, and enabling rapid operational response within a controlled compliance environment.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve audit-ready evidence?
faq_3_answer: SFTY preserves decision logs, evidence packages, and case histories to maintain a clear audit trail supporting compliance inspections and internal reviews.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY integrate with existing compliance stacks?
faq_4_answer: Yes, SFTY connects existing KYC, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers into one orchestrated compliance layer without disrupting current systems.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace KYC, KYT, or Travel Rule providers?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY acts as a compliance control layer above providers, structuring their outputs without replacing KYC, KYT, Travel Rule, or screening services.
final_title: Gain connected regulatory oversight for compliance
final_description: Review how SFTY gives VASP executives clear visibility across workflows, audit-ready evidence, and structured operational risk control.
footer_description: Supervisory and compliance control layer for digital asset markets, businesses and regulated institutions.
footer_contact_title: For supervisory, compliance and deployment discussions.
footer_legal_notice: This page is for informational purposes only and does not constitute legal, regulatory or compliance advice. SFTY deployment depends on jurisdiction, client requirements and applicable laws.
